title: Egg White Encrusted Toast
description: This earthy and fluffy Portuguese dish features egg whites encrusted on toast, suitable for a whole30-friendly brunch mood.

ingredients.name: Optional: Fresh herbs like parsley or dill

instructions: Toast slices of bread lightly until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In a small bowl, beat one egg white and add a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Dip each slice of toast into the beaten egg mixture to coat evenly on both sides.
Place coated slices of toast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until the egg whites are set and golden brown, flipping once if needed.
Let cool slightly before serving. Optionally sprinkle fresh herbs over the top to add more flavor.
